title: Assurance Manager (Energy Projects) — Contract
description_raw:
Carbon60 are recruiting an Assurance Manager for a major operator in the North Sea. This is a senior contract position engaged outside IR35, supporting project assurance across a brownfield offshore oil and gas modification programme.

The Assurance Manager will lead the independent assurance function across mechanical, structural, and process engineering deliverables for a topside modification project.

Key responsibilities:
- Establish and maintain the project assurance framework for offshore oil and gas scope
- Lead independent assurance reviews of key engineering deliverables (mechanical, process, structural)
- Interface with the Verification Body (DNV) and client integrity team
- Maintain the project assurance register and track close-out of findings
- Facilitate discipline design reviews and HAZOP/HAZID sessions
- Report assurance status to the project director and client management team

Profile:
- Chartered Engineer (IMechE, IChemE, or equivalent)
- 10+ years in oil and gas engineering (mechanical, process, or structural)
- Prior experience as an Assurance Manager or Technical Authority in energy sector
- Knowledge of offshore standards (DNVGL-RP-0002, ISO 9001)

Rate: £700–£800/day outside IR35
Duration: 18 months
Start: ASAP
Location: Aberdeen with offshore visits
